title: SICP 3.4 concurrency, serializers, and account exchange
goal: Implement a bounded SICP 3.4 concurrency probe covering serializers, serialized account operations, exchange, and the book's correctness hazards without making the release gate nondeterministic.
next_actions: Implement a deterministic serializer model suitable for JIT/AOT tests.
Cover serialized deposits/withdrawals and serialized account exchange.
Model or simulate interleaving hazards in a bounded deterministic way so the test proves the SICP semantics without flaky timing.
Include clear PASS/FAIL checks for protected balance invariants and deadlock-avoidance ordering if implemented.
acceptance: The probe passes under AOT compile/run.
ICC sicp-completeness observes sicp_ch3_concurrency_r and sicp_ch3_concurrency_aot as PASS.
ux_payoff: Covers SICP's concurrency chapter while keeping the release gate deterministic and repeatable.
